# Level Access Baths
> Omaha's accessible bathroom specialist. Zero-entry showers, tub-to-shower conversions, and aging-in-place bathroom design. Owner-installed. Lifetime warranty.

## Who We Are
Level Access Baths is a locally owned, owner-operated accessible bathroom company serving Omaha, Nebraska and surrounding communities including Council Bluffs, Bellevue, Papillion, La Vista, Elkhorn, Gretna, Millard, Ralston, Carter Lake, and Plattsmouth.

The owner has personally installed over 500 accessible showers, including extensive experience working within national bathroom remodeling companies. Level Access Baths was founded because homeowners deserve better — an honest sale, a clean installation, and real follow-up after the job is done.

We are not a franchise. We have no private equity investors. Every decision is centered on the customer.

## What We Do
- **Zero-Entry Showers**: Barrier-free shower design with no threshold. The safest shower option available.
- **Tub-to-Shower Conversions**: Full bathtub removal and replacement with a walk-in shower. Typically completed in 1-2 days.
- **ADA Bathroom Remodeling**: Fully ADA-compliant accessible bathroom design for veterans, individuals with disabilities, and anyone needing complete mobility support.
- **Aging-in-Place Bathroom Design**: Proactive bathroom modifications to support independent living at home for years to come.
- **Walk-In Shower Upgrades**: Replacement of old tile or fiberglass enclosures with durable solid surface systems.
- **Grab Bar & Safety Accessory Installation**: Professionally anchored grab bars, fold-down benches, handheld showerheads, and non-slip surfaces.

## Pricing
Shower conversions start around $6,000. Full accessible remodels range from $12,000+. All quotes are all-in — no hidden fees. Free in-home consultation always provided before any quote. Veteran and senior discounts available.

## Service Area
Omaha NE, Bellevue NE, Papillion NE, La Vista NE, Ralston NE, Gretna NE, Millard NE, Elkhorn NE, Council Bluffs IA, Carter Lake IA, Plattsmouth NE, and surrounding eastern Nebraska and western Iowa communities.

## Why Choose Level Access Baths
- 500+ accessible showers personally installed by the owner
- Locally owned — no investors, no quotas, no private equity pressure
- Lifetime leak-free warranty on every installation
- 1-2 day installation — minimal disruption to your home
- Specialist focus: we only do accessible bathrooms
- Real follow-up after every job to confirm satisfaction
- Referral partner for occupational therapists, discharge planners, and home health coordinators
- Veteran and senior discounts available
